# GitHub Copilot Customizations

> **Version: {{VERSION}}** · [robertsinfosec/gh-copilot-customizations](https://github.com/robertsinfosec/gh-copilot-customizations)

## Quick Start

1. Download and extract a [release](https://github.com/robertsinfosec/gh-copilot-customizations/releases) into your repo root (the `.github/` folder merges with your existing one)
2. Run `/detect-stack` in Copilot chat to generate technology-specific standards
3. Start coding — all governance is now active

## What's Included

### Instructions (always-on rules)

| File | Scope | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `copilot-instructions.md` | All interactions | Governance hierarchy, project context discovery, self-review protocol |
| `security-standards` | All code | OWASP ASVS v5 security controls |
| `coding-standards` | All code | Universal engineering principles |
| `testing-standards` | Test files | Testing structure, coverage, boundaries |
| `zero-tech-debt` | All code | Debt-free policy |
| `accessibility` | UI/frontend | WCAG 2.2 AA compliance |
| `api-design` | API code | RESTful design, error formats |
| `database-safety` | DB code | Migration safety, parameterized queries |
| `sast-scanning` | CI/workflows | Static analysis configuration |
| `sca-scanning` | CI/workflows | Dependency vulnerability scanning |
| `brand-compliance` | UI/docs | Brand voice and terminology |
| `readme-badges` | README | Badge formatting standards |
| `compliance-controls` | All code | Org-specific regulatory controls (configure per org) |
| `stack-standards` | All code | Auto-generated by `/detect-stack` |

### Prompts (slash commands)

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `/detect-stack` | Scan repo, research best practices, generate stack-standards |
| `/plan-work` | Turn a braindump into structured GitHub Issues |
| `/execute-work` | Implement a GitHub Issue following all governance standards |
| `/review-work` | Comprehensive code review against all governance domains |

### Agents (specialized reviewers)

| Agent | Access | Purpose |
|-------|--------|---------|
| `@brand-guardian` | Read-only | Brand compliance audit |
| `@compliance-auditor` | Read-only + web | Regulatory compliance audit |
| `@security-reviewer` | Read-only | OWASP/NIST security review |
| `@strict-code-reviewer` | Read-only | Uncompromising multi-domain review |
| `@tech-debt-hunter` | Read + edit | Find and fix technical debt |
| `@technical-writer` | Read + edit | Documentation maintenance |

### Skills (workflows)

Invoked automatically by agents or manually via description matching:

`brand-standards-check` · `compliance-review` · `documentation-maintenance` · `readme-badge-bar` · `sast-setup` · `sca-setup` · `security-audit` · `tech-debt-elimination` · `threat-modeling`

## Configuration

**Required for your org**: Edit `instructions/compliance-controls.instructions.md` with your regulatory obligations (PCI-DSS, GDPR, HIPAA, etc.)

**Required for your stack**: Run `/detect-stack` once after installation — it scans your repo and generates `instructions/stack-standards.instructions.md` with technology-specific best practices.

**Optional**: Create `docs/BRAND.md` to enable brand compliance auditing.
